assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response focuses on upgrading within Istio versions but doesn't specifically address Istio control plane compatibility with Kubernetes 1.32

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: No mention of checking Istio-Kubernetes compatibility matrix before the GKE upgrade

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response doesn't address the sequence of upgrading Istio vs GKE or mention upgrading Istio first for compatibility

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: No explanation of sidecar injection mechanics via mutating webhook or issues during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: The response includes commands to verify sidecar versions after pod restarts and mentions checking sidecar image versions

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: The response includes proxy-status monitoring and commands to check proxy sync status and sidecar versions

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Multiple istioctl commands are provided including 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands for checking pod versions

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While the response mentions monitoring for issues, it doesn't specifically warn about traffic disruption from version mismatches between control plane and sidecars
